# Requirements (slimmed — cross-cutting only)

FR-specific content lives in `specs/frs/<ulid>.md`. This file holds cross-cutting material only (NFRs, edge cases, out-of-scope, traceability).

## Non-Functional Requirements

See technical-spec.md for the full NFR list. NFRs are layout-agnostic and remain in this file after v2 migration.

## Edge Cases

Cross-cutting edge cases that span multiple FRs stay here. Per-FR edge cases moved to each FR file's `## Notes` section.

## Traceability Matrix

| Requirement | Implementation | Tests |
|-------------|---------------|-------|
| *(see individual FR files under specs/frs/ for per-FR traceability)* | | |
